data-sensitivity.description: Data sensitivity classification (e.g., personal, confidential). Example: Personal data - pseudonymized.

dataset-identifier.description: Unique dataset identifier such as DOI or URI. Example: https://doi.org/10.1234/example-dataset.

dataset-license.description: License terms for dataset usage. Example: ODC-BY-1.0.

dataset-name.description: Name of the dataset component. Example: Example Instruction Dataset.

dataset-origin.description: Source provenance information for the dataset. Example: Curated from public web crawl 2025-Q4.

dataset-provider.description: Organization or source providing the dataset. Example: Example Data Foundation.

dataset-version.description: Version or release identifier of the dataset. Example: 2025.12.

integrity-hash.description: Cryptographic hash of dataset artifact. Example: SHA-256 b94d27b9934d3e08a52e52d7da7dabfac484efe3.

description: Dataset component entry for an AI SBOM. Reference: BSI, "SBOM for AI — minimum elements" (https://www.bsi.bund.de/SharedDocs/Downloads/EN/BSI/KI/SBOM-for-AI_minimum-elements.pdf?__blob=publicationFile&v=4).
name: ai-dataset-component
